data.name: buttonSimulate.ToolTip
data.value: Run the dynamic-compression diffraction simulation and accumulate the pattern.

data.name: checkBoxSkipDrawing.ToolTip
data.value: When checked, skips on-screen drawing during the calculation to speed it up.

data.name: label2.ToolTip
data.value: Depth of the front boundary separating the uncompressed and compressed regions.

data.name: label3.ToolTip
data.value: Depth of the back boundary separating the compressed and released regions.

data.name: buttonSetFolder.ToolTip
data.value: Choose the output folder where simulated TIFF patterns are saved.

data.name: textBoxFileName.ToolTip
data.value: Base file name for the saved TIFF pattern; '.tif' is appended automatically.

data.name: label8.ToolTip
data.value: Base file name for the saved TIFF pattern; '.tif' is appended automatically.

data.name: numericBoxCompressedOmega.ToolTip
data.value: Mean crystal rotation rate ω in the compressed region (°/ns).

data.name: numericBoxCompressedOmegaSigma.ToolTip
data.value: Standard deviation σ_ω of the rotation rate in the compressed region (°/ns).

data.name: numericBoxCompressedThetaA.ToolTip
data.value: Constant term a (°) of the rotation-axis spread σ_θ for the compressed region (2019 model).

data.name: numericBoxCompressedThetaB.ToolTip
data.value: Time coefficient b (°/ns) of the rotation-axis spread σ_θ for the compressed region (2019 model).

data.name: checkBoxOmegaStep.ToolTip
data.value: When checked, repeats the simulation while incrementing the overall Ω angle by a fixed step.

data.name: checkBoxSaveSimulatedPattern.ToolTip
data.value: When checked, saves each simulated pattern as a TIFF file to the chosen folder.

data.name: numericBoxDivisionOfRotationAngle.ToolTip
data.value: Number of sampling divisions for integrating over the rotation-rate (speed) distribution.

data.name: numericBoxDivisionOfRotationAxis.ToolTip
data.value: Number of azimuthal sampling divisions for the rotation axis.

data.name: numericBoxReleasedOmega.ToolTip
data.value: Mean crystal rotation rate ω in the released region (°/ns).

data.name: numericBoxReleasedOmegaSigma.ToolTip
data.value: Standard deviation σ_ω of the rotation rate in the released region (°/ns).

data.name: numericBoxReleasedThetaA.ToolTip
data.value: Constant term a (°) of the rotation-axis spread σ_θ for the released region (2019 model).

data.name: numericBoxReleasedThetaB.ToolTip
data.value: Time coefficient b (°/ns) of the rotation-axis spread σ_θ for the released region (2019 model).

data.name: numericBoxShockedPlaneH.ToolTip
data.value: Miller index h of the shocked (compression) plane normal.

data.name: numericBoxShockedPlaneK.ToolTip
data.value: Miller index k of the shocked (compression) plane normal.

data.name: numericBoxShockedPlaneL.ToolTip
data.value: Miller index l of the shocked (compression) plane normal.

data.name: numericBoxSlipPlaneH.ToolTip
data.value: Miller index h of the slip-plane normal (used to define the rotation axis in the 2019 model).

data.name: numericBoxSlipPlaneK.ToolTip
data.value: Miller index k of the slip-plane normal (used to define the rotation axis in the 2019 model).

data.name: numericBoxSlipPlaneL.ToolTip
data.value: Miller index l of the slip-plane normal (used to define the rotation axis in the 2019 model).

data.name: numericBoxUp.ToolTip
data.value: Shock (compression) wave speed Us (km/s) used to convert depth into elapsed time in the compressed region.

data.name: radioButtonCompressedIsotropic.ToolTip
data.value: Apply isotropic (hydrostatic) compression of the lattice in the compressed region.

data.name: radioButtonCompressedUniaxial.ToolTip
data.value: Apply uniaxial compression of the lattice along the shocked-plane normal in the compressed region.

data.name: numericBoxUr.ToolTip
data.value: Release wave speed Ur (km/s) used to convert depth into elapsed time in the released region.

data.name: radioButtonReleasedIsotropic.ToolTip
data.value: Apply isotropic (hydrostatic) compression of the lattice in the released region.

data.name: radioButtonReleasedUniaxial.ToolTip
data.value: Apply uniaxial compression of the lattice along the shocked-plane normal in the released region.

data.name: numericBoxOmegaStep.ToolTip
data.value: Ω angle increment (°) applied per repeat when 'Increment Ω' is enabled.

data.name: numericBoxOmegaTimes.ToolTip
data.value: Number of repeats when 'Increment Ω' is enabled.

data.name: radioButton2018Model.ToolTip
data.value: Use the 2018 rotation model (rotation axes perpendicular to the compression axis).

data.name: radioButton2019Model.ToolTip
data.value: Use the 2019 rotation model (rotation axis from the slip-plane / compression-plane cross product, with θ,φ spread).

data.name: numericBoxEOS_K0.ToolTip
data.value: Bulk modulus K0 (GPa) for the third-order Birch–Murnaghan equation of state.

data.name: numericBoxEOS_Kprime.ToolTip
data.value: Pressure derivative of the bulk modulus K'0 for the third-order Birch–Murnaghan equation of state.

data.name: numericBoxMassAbsorption.ToolTip
data.value: Mass absorption coefficient (cm²/g) of the sample used to attenuate intensities through the layers.

data.name: label4.ToolTip
data.value: Mass absorption coefficient (cm²/g) of the sample used to attenuate intensities through the layers.
